description: Case style: Analogue watch with a square stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Steel dial with metallic hands Strap style: Black textured genuine leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 3 and 9 hour marks on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 year warranty on mechanism only, 1 year on battery
